ogTitle: Walpeup vs Wandana Heights: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Walpeup and Wandana Heights.
heading: Walpeup vs Wandana Heights — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Walpeup, Victoria and Wandana Heights, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Walpeup has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Wandana Heights (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Walpeup or Wandana Heights safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Walpeup has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Wandana Heights scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Walpeup scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Wandana Heights scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Walpeup or Wandana Heights?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Walpeup has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
